About Me

Building Things That Matter

Hi! I'm Bhavana Battula — a third-year B.Tech Computer Science (AI Specialization) student at G.H. Raisoni College of Engineering & Management, Pune, with a CGPA of 8.6/10.0.

I build at the intersection of artificial intelligence, full-stack engineering, and DevOps. From NLP-driven resume tools and audio ML systems, to React + TypeScript platforms and mental wellness apps — I turn ideas into working, deployed products.

"I don't just write models — I engineer intelligent systems that scale, automate, and actually ship to users."

IBM-certified (×2) and NPTEL Elite (×2). Always learning. Currently leveling up in cloud deployment, CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and MLOps to own the full lifecycle from training to production.

Projects

Things I've Built

01
🧠

EmoShield

Mental wellness & emotional resilience platform with Habit Builder, Wellness Games, XP-tracked personal dashboard, and AI Wellness Coach. Live on Vercel, used by real users.

HTML/CSS/JSAI APIVercelUI/UX
GitHub
02
🎙️

SpeakSafe

AI-powered audio analysis using MFCC signal processing + trained ML classifier. Detects audio authenticity with real-time confidence scores. Supports mic recording & file upload. Live on Streamlit Cloud.

PythonScikit-learnLibrosaStreamlit
GitHub Live Demo ↗
03
📄

SmartResume AI

NLP-powered resume analyzer & ATS-compatible generator. Matches CVs to job descriptions, highlights missing keywords, AI improvement tips, and PDF export. Live on HuggingFace.

PythonNLPGradioFlaskFPDF
GitHub Live ↗

🏫

College Complaint System

Full-stack complaint management platform for students: online registration, real-time status tracking, admin dashboard, secure auth, MySQL backend, and email updates.

Node.jsPHPMySQLHTML/CSS/JS

AI Interview Coach

Intelligent interview prep platform. Runs real-time AI-driven mock sessions, provides targeted feedback, and builds candidate confidence for technical & behavioural rounds.

SpendIt — Expense Tracker

Beyond Code

Soft Skills & Experiences

🎤
Public Speaking & Presentations

Delivered classroom presentations on advanced AI topics — Reinforcement Learning and Neural Networks — to peers at GH Raisoni College, explaining complex concepts clearly and confidently.

🏆
Hackathon Participation — Smart India Hackathon

Participated in the Smart India Hackathon (SIH) Internal Round at GH Raisoni College. Pitched a technical solution to a panel of judges, demonstrating teamwork, problem-solving under pressure, and the ability to present a cohesive technical approach.

🤝
Team Collaboration & Leadership

Led and collaborated in team settings — coordinating with peers in hackathons and group projects, delegating tasks, and driving the team toward a shared goal under tight deadlines.

🧠
Technical Communication

Able to break down complex AI/ML topics into accessible explanations — whether presenting to classmates or pitching to a jury of experts. Strong documentation and articulation skills.
